channel.title: How to use rebassjs?
channel.description: Hello , i have tried to import rebassjs in default mars-theme in list component but when I save it and run than its showing blank page in localhost

item.title: How to use rebassjs?
item.dc:creator: mehul
item.description:
sorry but there was error in my code and now its running okay

Read full topic

item.title: How to use rebassjs?
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @mehul

Thanks for your interest in Frontity.

Can you provide more information please. Do you have a link to the site that we can take a look at? Can you post the code in your list component please, and also the code of any other files in your theme with changes relevant to rebassjs, if any.

Are you getting any compile errors?

Let us know and we’ll try to help your further.

Read full topic

item.title: How to use rebassjs?

item.description:

i have tried to import rebassjs in default mars-theme in list component but when I save it and run than its showing blank page in localhost
